questions.text: Which of the following describes a key bottleneck related to Routing Algorithms?
options: Inefficient scaling of Link State (OSPF Dijkstra) vs Distance Vector (RIP Bellman-Ford count-to-infinity).
questions.correct_answer: Inefficient scaling of Link State (OSPF Dijkstra) vs Distance Vector (RIP Bellman-Ford count-to-infinity).
questions.explanation: The topic covers how Link State (OSPF Dijkstra) vs Distance Vector (RIP Bellman-Ford count-to-infinity) scales under concurrent workloads, which represents the primary bottlenecks.
